message:
test/bench: add sync primitive benchmarks, timer precision benchmarks, loom tests, rewrite spike tests, structured lab evidence logging

Comprehensive test and benchmark expansion for the asupersync migration:

New benchmarks:
- sync_primitives.rs (442 lines): Criterion benchmarks comparing
  asupersync vs tokio for Mutex, RwLock, Semaphore in uncontended and
  contended (2/4/8 task) scenarios
- timer_precision.rs (265 lines): Criterion benchmarks for sleep
  latency, deadline accuracy under load, timer create/cancel throughput
  comparing LabRuntime virtual time vs tokio paused clock

Benchmark updates:
- spike_comparison.rs: Replace no-op lab_oracle bench with real
  sleep_wakeup measurement using LabRuntime auto-advance
- cache_gc.rs: Updated to use new proptest infrastructure

New tests:
- loom_sync.rs (271 lines): Loom model-checking for mutex mutual
  exclusion, rwlock reader-writer invariant, and custom ticket semaphore
  permit count — verifies concurrency contracts with exhaustive
  schedule exploration
- mux_migration_completion.rs: Migration completion verification tests

Rewritten tests:
- asupersync_spike.rs (+344/-150): All 5 spike tests rewritten for
  rigor — partial-read PDU framing with mock streams, Cx cancellation
  propagation through scoped tasks, 10-task semaphore concurrency with
  pre-cancelled budgets, LabRuntime virtual time auto-advance, Select
  semantics with real async contention

Lab harness improvements:
- common/lab.rs (+238 lines): LabTestConfig gains component/bead_id/
  artifact_dir fields; LabTestReport gains correlation_id/event_count/
  event_log_path; all run_* functions now create TestEventLogger, emit
  structured JSONL events, capture panics with resume_unwind
- lab_smoke.rs: New test verifying structured event log is written

Behavioral test expansion:
- vendored_async_contract_behavioral.rs: Add B23g-style external Cx
  cancellation helpers and additional contract tests

Cargo.toml: Register new benchmarks, add criterion/loom/proptest deps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -157,6 +157,16 @@ name = "cx_propagation"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "sync_primitives"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "timer_precision"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "task_spawn"
 harness = false
